nodes.label: column

properties.name: columnDataType
properties.description: The declared database data type of a relational column.

properties.name: columnDefaultValue
properties.description: The default value expression defined for a relational column.

properties.name: columnId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a relational column.

properties.name: columnLength
properties.description: The maximum defined length for a relational column value.

properties.name: columnName
properties.description: The name of a relational column.

properties.name: columnPrecision
properties.description: The numeric precision defined for a relational column.

properties.name: columnScale
properties.description: The numeric scale defined for a relational column.

properties.name: isNullable
properties.description: Indicates whether a relational column permits null values.

properties.name: ordinalPosition
properties.description: The ordinal position of a relational column within its table.

nodes.description: Relational column protected by entitlement rules.

nodes.label: column mask rule

properties.name: columnMaskRuleId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a column mask rule.

properties.name: llmRewriteInstruction
properties.description: A canonical instruction telling an LLM how to rewrite a query for this entitlement rule.

properties.name: maskValueExpression
properties.description: The expression used to compute the masked value emitted by a column mask rule.

properties.name: rewriteTemplate
properties.description: A deterministic query or projection rewrite template with placeholders for runtime entitlement values.

properties.name: ruleExpression
properties.description: The executable or declarative expression associated with an entitlement rule.

properties.name: valueSourceExpression
properties.description: The expression, path, or lookup instruction used to resolve entitlement rule values at runtime.

nodes.description: Rule that transforms or redacts sensitive column values.

nodes.label: comparison operator
nodes.description: Enumeration of comparison operators available to row filter predicates.

nodes.label: deny behavior
nodes.description: Enumeration of enforcement behaviors applied when a row filter rule denies access.

nodes.label: entitlement rule

properties.name: llmRewriteInstruction
properties.description: A canonical instruction telling an LLM how to rewrite a query for this entitlement rule.

properties.name: rewriteTemplate
properties.description: A deterministic query or projection rewrite template with placeholders for runtime entitlement values.

properties.name: ruleExpression
properties.description: The executable or declarative expression associated with an entitlement rule.

properties.name: valueSourceExpression
properties.description: The expression, path, or lookup instruction used to resolve entitlement rule values at runtime.

nodes.description: Abstract superclass for entitlement rules that constrain row visibility or column values.

nodes.label: fallback behavior
nodes.description: Enumeration of fallback behaviors applied when a column mask rule cannot resolve masking inputs.

nodes.label: filter action
nodes.description: Enumeration of actions a row filter rule can apply during entitlement evaluation.

nodes.label: jdbc connection profile

properties.name: connectionTimeoutSeconds
properties.description: The connection timeout in seconds for a JDBC connection profile.

properties.name: jdbcConnectionProfileId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a JDBC connection profile.

properties.name: jdbcDriver
properties.description: The JDBC driver class or driver identifier for a connection profile.

properties.name: jdbcUrl
properties.description: The JDBC connection URL for a connection profile.

properties.name: jdbcUserName
properties.description: The user name used by a JDBC connection profile to authenticate to a database.

properties.name: sslMode
properties.description: The SSL or transport security mode configured for a JDBC connection profile.

nodes.description: JDBC endpoint and driver metadata for a target database.

nodes.label: mask action
nodes.description: Enumeration of actions a column mask rule can apply to protected column values.

nodes.label: masking method
nodes.description: Enumeration of masking or transformation strategies available to column mask rules.

nodes.label: match mode
nodes.description: Enumeration of value cardinality modes expected by a row filter rule.

nodes.label: policy

properties.name: policyDescription
properties.description: A textual description of the purpose, scope, or semantics of a policy.

properties.name: policyId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a policy.

properties.name: policyName
properties.description: The human-readable name assigned to a policy.

nodes.description: Bundle of row-filter and/or column-mask rules.

nodes.label: policy group

properties.name: policyGroupId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a policy group.

properties.name: policyGroupName
properties.description: The human-readable name assigned to a policy group.

nodes.description: Collection of policies mapped to a persona, role, or function.

nodes.label: relational database

properties.name: databaseEdition
properties.description: The commercial or deployment edition of a relational database instance.

properties.name: databaseName
properties.description: The logical or configured name of a relational database instance.

properties.name: databaseVendor
properties.description: The database vendor or product family for a relational database instance.

properties.name: databaseVersion
properties.description: The software version of a relational database instance.

properties.name: hostName
properties.description: The network host name serving a relational database instance.

properties.name: portNumber
properties.description: The network port used by a relational database instance.

properties.name: relationalDatabaseId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a relational database instance.

nodes.description: JDBC-connectable relational database platform.

nodes.label: row filter rule

properties.name: llmRewriteInstruction
properties.description: A canonical instruction telling an LLM how to rewrite a query for this entitlement rule.

properties.name: rewriteTemplate
properties.description: A deterministic query or projection rewrite template with placeholders for runtime entitlement values.

properties.name: rowFilterRuleId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a row filter rule.

properties.name: ruleExpression
properties.description: The executable or declarative expression associated with an entitlement rule.

properties.name: valueSourceExpression
properties.description: The expression, path, or lookup instruction used to resolve entitlement rule values at runtime.

nodes.description: Rule that restricts row visibility using predicates.

nodes.label: rule priority
nodes.description: Enumeration of precedence levels used to order entitlement rules during evaluation.

nodes.label: schema

properties.name: isDefaultSchema
properties.description: Indicates whether a relational schema is the default schema in its database context.

properties.name: schemaDescription
properties.description: A descriptive summary of the purpose or contents of a relational schema.

properties.name: schemaId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a relational schema.

properties.name: schemaName
properties.description: The name of a relational schema.

properties.name: schemaOwner
properties.description: The owning principal or administrative owner of a relational schema.

properties.name: schemaType
properties.description: The functional or administrative type of a relational schema.

nodes.description: Relational schema/container for tables.

nodes.label: sensitivity classification
nodes.description: Enumeration of data sensitivity levels used to classify relational columns for entitlement and masking decisions.

nodes.label: table

properties.name: isTemporaryTable
properties.description: Indicates whether a relational table is temporary or session-scoped.

properties.name: rowCountEstimate
properties.description: An estimated row count for a relational table.

properties.name: tableDescription
properties.description: A descriptive summary of the purpose or contents of a relational table.

properties.name: tableId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a relational table.

properties.name: tableName
properties.description: The name of a relational table.

properties.name: tableOwner
properties.description: The owning principal or administrative owner of a relational table.

properties.name: tableType
properties.description: The functional type of a relational table, such as base table or view-backed table.

nodes.description: Relational table containing columns.

nodes.label: user

properties.name: userId
properties.description: The unique identifier assigned to a user.

nodes.description: Principal that invokes or is evaluated against entitlement policies, including a human actor or an automated process.

nodes.label: user type
nodes.description: Classification of a user by the kind of actor it represents for entitlement evaluation.

nodes.label: value source type
nodes.description: Enumeration of runtime source categories used to resolve entitlement rule values.

nodes.label: allow
nodes.description: Filter action that permits access to rows matching the rule predicate.

nodes.label: between
nodes.description: Comparison operator requiring a value to fall between two bounds.

nodes.label: block query
nodes.description: Deny behavior that blocks the data access request.

nodes.label: confidential
nodes.description: Sensitivity classification for data requiring restricted access because disclosure could create business or privacy risk.

nodes.label: deny
nodes.description: Filter action that denies access to rows matching the rule predicate.

nodes.label: derived query
nodes.description: Value source type resolved by executing or evaluating a derived lookup query.

nodes.label: equals
nodes.description: Comparison operator for equality predicates.

nodes.label: hashing
nodes.description: Masking method that emits a deterministic hash of the original value.

nodes.label: high priority
nodes.description: Priority level indicating a rule should be evaluated before lower-priority rules.

nodes.label: human user
nodes.description: User type representing an individual human actor authenticated to access protected data.

nodes.label: in list
nodes.description: Comparison operator requiring a value to appear in an allowed set.

nodes.label: internal
nodes.description: Sensitivity classification for data intended for internal organizational use.

nodes.label: low priority
nodes.description: Priority level indicating a rule should be evaluated after higher-priority rules.

nodes.label: medium priority
nodes.description: Priority level indicating a rule should be evaluated with standard precedence.

nodes.label: multiple values
nodes.description: Match mode indicating the rule expects a collection of comparison values.

nodes.label: no value
nodes.description: Match mode indicating the rule does not require a comparison value.

nodes.label: not equals
nodes.description: Comparison operator for inequality predicates.

nodes.label: not in list
nodes.description: Comparison operator requiring a value not to appear in a denied set.

nodes.label: null replacement
nodes.description: Masking method that replaces the original value with null.

nodes.label: nullify
nodes.description: Mask action that replaces the protected value with null.

nodes.label: pattern masking
nodes.description: Masking method that preserves a configured pattern while hiding protected portions of a value.

nodes.label: phi
nodes.description: Sensitivity classification for protected health information.

nodes.label: pii
nodes.description: Sensitivity classification for personally identifiable information.

nodes.label: process user
nodes.description: User type representing an automated process, service account, or system integration actor.

nodes.label: public
nodes.description: Sensitivity classification for data approved for public disclosure.

nodes.label: redact
nodes.description: Mask action that redacts the protected value.

nodes.label: request context
nodes.description: Value source type resolved from the current data access request context.

nodes.label: restricted
nodes.description: Sensitivity classification for highly controlled data requiring strict access and masking governance.

nodes.label: return no rows
nodes.description: Deny behavior that rewrites access to produce an empty result set.

nodes.label: return null
nodes.description: Fallback behavior that returns null when masking inputs cannot be resolved.

nodes.label: reveal
nodes.description: Mask action that reveals the original value.

nodes.label: session context
nodes.description: Value source type resolved from the current authenticated session context.

nodes.label: single value
nodes.description: Match mode indicating the rule expects one comparison value.

nodes.label: static literal
nodes.description: Value source type where the rule stores a literal value directly.

nodes.label: static substitution
nodes.description: Masking method that emits a fixed replacement value.

nodes.label: subject attribute
nodes.description: Value source type resolved from an attribute of the evaluated user or principal.

nodes.label: substitute
nodes.description: Mask action that substitutes the protected value with a configured replacement.

nodes.label: tokenization
nodes.description: Masking method that emits a reversible or managed token for the original value.

nodes.label: tokenize
nodes.description: Mask action that replaces the original value with a token.

nodes.label: use default mask
nodes.description: Fallback behavior that applies a configured default mask when rule-specific inputs cannot be resolved.

relationships.description: Schema belongs to a relational database.
A table belongs to exactly one schema.
A column belongs to exactly one table.
JDBC profile connects to a target relational database.
Associates a row filter rule with the comparison operator used in its predicate.
Associates a row filter rule with the enforcement behavior used when access is denied.
Associates a column mask rule with the fallback behavior used when masking inputs cannot be resolved.
Associates a row filter rule with the action it applies when rewriting or evaluating a query.
Associates a column mask rule with the masking action it applies.
Associates a column mask rule with the masking or transformation method it uses.
Associates a row filter rule with the value cardinality mode it expects.
Associates an entitlement rule with its precedence level.
Associates an entitlement rule with its precedence level.
Associates a relational column with a data sensitivity classification used by entitlement and masking controls.
A user is classified by a user type that identifies whether it is a human actor or an automated process.
Associates an entitlement rule with the runtime source category used to resolve rule values.
Policy group bundles one or more policies.
User inherits policies via policy group membership.
column mask rule is a subclass of entitlement rule
row filter rule is a subclass of entitlement rule
Row-filter rule targets a specific column context.
Column-mask rule targets a specific column.
